title: selaginella albociliata
intro: Selaginella albociliata, also known as the Silver Cliff Spikemoss, is a species of fern-like plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella albociliata are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Selaginella albociliata include teas, infusions, and extracts that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
